ancestry_modifiers: Ancestry-specific baseline burden can change observed effect sizes.
biological_mechanism: Lead, cadmium, and arsenic burden perturbs vascular, immune, and hematologic regulation.
definition: Heavy Metals is curated as a population-level modifier in GENARCH for educational gene-environment interpretation across disease models.
dose_response_model: Cumulative body burden and co-exposure dependent.
name: Heavy Metals

proxies.measurement_method: Standardized z-score from harmonized public indicators
proxies.name: Heavy Metals composite index

references.title: GENARCH curated synthesis for Heavy Metals

sensitive_windows.mechanism_rationale: Childhood and chronic adulthood vulnerability windows.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Lead, cadmium, and arsenic burden perturbs vascular, immune, and hematologic regulation.

temporal_sensitivity: Childhood and chronic adulthood vulnerability windows.
